# hetzner_ips (Data Source)

Lists all Hetzner IP addresses.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_ips" "all" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `ips` (Attributes List) List of IP addresses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ips))

<a id="nestedatt--ips"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ips`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String) The IP address.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the IP is locked.
- `separate_mac` (String) Separate MAC address.
- `server_ip` (String) The server main IP.
- `server_number` (Number) The server ID.
- `traffic_daily` (Number) Daily traffic limit in MB.
- `traffic_hourly` (Number) Hourly traffic limit in MB.
- `traffic_monthly` (Number) Monthly traffic limit in GB.
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean) Whether traffic warnings are enabled.
